openai.description: GPT-4.1 and GPT-5 family models tuned for fast SVG-friendly JSON output.

models.label: GPT-4.1 Nano
models.useCase: Fastest and most cost-efficient, good for simple animations.

models.label: GPT-4.1 Mini
models.useCase: Recommended default, balanced speed and quality.

models.label: GPT-4.1
models.useCase: Smartest non-reasoning model with 1M context window.

models.label: GPT-4o Mini
models.useCase: Legacy model, still available for existing workflows.

models.label: GPT-4o
models.useCase: Legacy GPT-4o for complex animations.

models.label: O4 Mini
models.useCase: Fast, cost-efficient reasoning model.

models.label: O3
models.useCase: Advanced reasoning model for complex problem solving.

models.label: O3 Mini
models.useCase: Smaller reasoning model, good balance of speed and capability.

models.label: GPT-5.2
models.useCase: Latest flagship model with peak intelligence.

anthropic.description: Claude 4.x family models excel at structured SVG-aware instructions and reasoning.

models.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6
models.useCase: Latest Sonnet with improved coding and reasoning.

models.label: Claude Opus 4.6
models.useCase: Most capable model, exceptional for complex animations.

models.label: Claude Sonnet 4.5
models.useCase: High-quality Sonnet with extended thinking support.

models.label: Claude Haiku 4.5
models.useCase: Blazing fast with near-Sonnet intelligence.

models.label: Claude Sonnet 4
models.useCase: Solid all-round model for coding and SVG generation.

google.description: Gemini 2.5 and 3.x models optimized for creative SVG prompting and fast generation.

models.label: Gemini 2.5 Flash
models.useCase: Recommended default with hybrid reasoning and 1M context window.

models.label: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.useCase: Advanced reasoning model for complex multimodal tasks.

models.label: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite
models.useCase: Optimized for cost-efficiency and high throughput.

models.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro (Preview)
models.useCase: Latest reasoning-first model for complex agentic workflows.

models.label: Gemini 3 Flash (Preview)
models.useCase: Fast frontier-class performance at low cost.
